Description
label_values.value:
Join us as we embark on a journey through Medistim's rich history! In this group, we'll delve into the archives and share captivating snapshots of memorable moments, milestones, and achievements over the past four decades. But that's not all â we'll also showcase snippets of colleagues' stories, highlighting their contributions and experiences that have shaped our company's legacy.

Prepare to be involved in quizzes, and other surprises!

Welcome to the HR-group on Workplace. Here we will share all HR-related information within our company, related to Norwegian laws and regulations, and provide you with easy access to essential documents, policies, and guidelines that shape our workplace culture.
